creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
There's a new version (1.0.0) released on 2011-10-20. It's better to
update to new version, because old API [1] is supported limited time.

[1] http://code.google.com/p/python-creole/wiki/API

2011/10/21  <linimon@freebsd.org>:
> Synopsis: [UPDATE] textproc/py-creole to 0.9.1
>
> State-Changed-From-To: feedback->open
> State-Changed-By: linimon
> State-Changed-When: Fri Oct 21 04:42:36 UTC 2011
> State-Changed-Why:
> maintainer has replied with updated patch.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=161467
>



-- 
olivier
